title: Password Reset
content: Users can reset their password by going to Settings, then Security, and clicking Reset Password.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create an account by clicking Sign Up and entering their email and password.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Two factor authentication can be enabled in the security settings page.

title: Profile Update
content: Users can update their name, email, and profile picture from the profile settings page.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account permanently from Settings under account management.
